title: podonephelium gongrocarpum
intro: Podonephelium gongrocarpum, also known as the Philippine tree dill, is a type of plant native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Podonephelium gongrocarpum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
